insights.error: Something went wrong while fetching data

privacy.title: Privacy Policy - MoodMate
privacy.intro: This document outlines how MoodMate handles user data, ensuring compliance with GDPR principles and protecting the privacy of our young users and their guardians.
privacy.section1.title: 1. Data Collection and Minimization
privacy.fields.nickname: Nickname: A display name for the parent/guardian (no full legal name required).
privacy.fields.scrambledSecret: Scrambled Secret: A mock-hashed version of the user's secret code to ensure security without storing plain-text passwords.
privacy.section3.title: 3. Parental Consent and Children's Privacy
privacy.section3.body: MoodMate is designed for children aged 6-7. As children under 13 cannot legally provide their own consent, active parental consent is a prerequisite for account creation. Registration is disabled until the guardian has explicitly checked the consent box.
privacy.section5.title: 5. Your Rights (GDPR)
privacy.section4.title: 4. Security and Storage
privacy.section4.body: No plain-text passwords: All secrets are scrambled (hashed) before storage. In this version data is stored in-memory (RAM), and is not persisted across server restarts.
terms.title: Terms of Service - MoodMate
terms.intro: Welcome to MoodMate. By creating an account, you (the Parent/Guardian) agree to the following terms.
terms.section1.title: 1. Data Ownership
terms.section1.items.0: MoodMate is a tool for learning about feelings and is not a replacement for professional help or therapy.
terms.section1.items.1: You retain ownership of your data. We will never sell your information.
terms.section2.title: 2. Parental Responsibility
terms.section2.items.0: Parents are responsible for accounts created for their children.
terms.section2.items.1: Child accounts are managed under the parent account.
terms.section2.items.2: Children under 13 should not use the app without supervision and parental approval.
terms.section3.title: 3. Acceptable Use and Data Privacy
terms.section3.body: To maintain the safety and privacy of your family: do not input sensitive personal identifiers such as physical addresses, phone numbers, or social security numbers into free-text fields.
terms.section3.items.0: Do not enter sensitive personal information like addresses, phone numbers, or passwords in free-text fields.
terms.section4.title: 4. Consent and Withdrawal
terms.section4.body: Account creation requires active consent. You have the right to withdraw this consent at any time.
userManager.title: Profile administration
